title: The AI Trust Test™
description: Tracy's 7-question test to help you evaluate AI tools before you commit your data and trust.
subtitle: Is This AI Tool Trustworthy?

sections.heading: Step 1: Define Your AI Standards
sections.content: Clarify the ethical, performance, and privacy standards your AI tools must meet before adoption.

sections.heading: Step 2: Run the AI Trust Test™
sections.content: Assess transparency, data handling, bias mitigation, and vendor accountability.

sections.heading: Step 3: Make a Decision
sections.content: Decide whether to adopt, monitor, or reject based on your evaluation results.

questions.question: Do you know what data this AI collects and how it uses it?
questions.description: Look for whether chats are stored, used for training, or shared with vendors. Ask in the app: "What data do you store and how do you use it?"

questions.question: Does the company publish safety notes, model cards, or risk discussions?
questions.description: Docs or blog posts that show testing, limitations, or red-team notes.

questions.question: Can you prevent training on your data and delete/export your data easily?
questions.description: Settings, data controls, export, deletion, enterprise toggles.

questions.question: Is there a status page or uptime/benchmark history?
questions.description: Look for uptime history, changelogs, or audit summaries.

questions.question: Is there a clear privacy policy (region hosting, SOC2/ISO, DPA)?
questions.description: Prefer vendors with security certifications and DPAs.

questions.question: Do they disclose fine-tuning or third-party data sharing?
questions.description: Check ToS and privacy for subprocessors and FT policies.

questions.question: Is turning off data training or deleting conversations straightforward?
questions.description: One-click or obvious steps is a green flag.

trusted.title: ✅ Trusted AI
trusted.description: This tool passes Tracy's AI Trust Test™. It's transparent, safe, and user-friendly. Move forward with confidence!

caution.title: ⚠️ Proceed With Caution
caution.description: This AI shows yellow flags. Read its terms carefully and double-check outputs before heavy use.

nextSteps.text: Download the AI Trust Test™ PDF

danger.title: ❌ Fails the Trust Test
danger.description: This tool fails key checks. It hides data practices, lacks transparency, or hasn't been independently validated.

proReport.title: Want an automated vendor report?
proReport.description: Pro scans policy pages, lawsuits, training data clues, provenance support, and more.
